title: Program
intro: The program is organized as a readable sequence of phases instead of a dense documentation tree.

phases.title: Arrival and orientation
phases.summary: Welcome, introductions, program setup, and shared expectations.

phases.title: AI foundations
phases.summary: Core concepts, practical examples, and hands-on exploration.

phases.title: Responsible innovation
phases.summary: Ethics, safety, bias, and the community impact of AI choices.

phases.title: Project work
phases.summary: Team-based challenge framing, iteration, and mentor feedback.

phases.title: Showcase
phases.summary: Final presentations, reflection, and next-step planning.
